issues.sample: MY VEHICLE ONLY HAS 42000 MILES ON IT. 6000 MILES OVER WARRANTY.  AS I WAS TURNING I HEARD A RATTLING AND THE AIRBAG LIGHT CAME ON, HORN DOESN'T WORK AND STEERING WHEEL BUTTONS DO NOT WORK. DEALERSHIP SAID IT'S THE STEERING WHEEL CLOCK SPRING IN THE STEERING WHEEL. SAME ISSUE AS

BACKUP CAMERA SCREEN TOO DARK. CANNOT SEE WHAT IS BEHIND YOU.  ALL SOFTWARE ADJUSTMENTS TRIED TO IMPROVE VIDEO I.E. INCREASE BRIGHTNESS DOES NOT HELP.  CHECKED ANOTHER 2015 TIGUAN AT DEALER AND IT HAD SAME PROBLEM.  WORRIED THAT POOR PERFORMANCE OF BACKUP CAMERA SYSTEM WILL NOT D

THESE ENGINES ARE SUSCEPTIBLE TO CARBON BUILD-UP, WHICH MAKE THEM RUN EXTREMELY ROUGH, JERK, MISFIRE, AND OVERALL CANNOT GET UP TO SPEED WHEN COLD.  THIS IS DANGEROUS, A WASTE SINCE MPG FALLS DRASTICALLY, AND COULD RESULT AN ACCIDENT.   OVER NORMAL WEAR AT 70,000 MILES, MY TIGUAN

OCT 19TH, 2017 CLOCK SPRING BROKE, WHILE EXITING OUT OF PARKING LOT, FOLLOWED BY AIRBAG WARNING LIGHT APPEARING ON DASHBOARD, ALONG WITH ALARM SOUND.  AS I CONTINUED TO DRIVE ON SIDE STREET, I WAS NOT ABLE TO USE MY HORN AS ANOTHER STARTED TO ENTER MY LANE. UPON RETURN TO PARKING

WE CURRENTLY HAVE AN ISSUE WITH OUR BRAKING SYSTEM IN OUR 2015 VOLKSWAGEN TIGUAN.  AT LOW SPEEDS THE CAR DOES NOT BRAKE PROPERLY. THE CAR WILL LOOSE ITS ABILITY TO BRAKE AND WILL MAKE A LOUD GRINDING SOUND.  THIS HAPPENS AT RANDOM TIMES AND THE CAR MANUFACTURE CANNOT SEEM TO REPL

narrative.headline: What 2015 Volkswagen Tiguan owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 62 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Air Bags (45% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
